description_long: This object is a flat-panel computer monitor with a wide, rectangular display framed by a matte black bezel. The front features a vibrant red screen with the text 'The Red Hat Archive' prominently displayed in white, indicating branding or content. The bezel is moderately thick and has a simple, modern design with slightly rounded corners. The monitor is supported by a circular pedestal stand that appears sturdy and stable, made from the same black material as the bezel. The rear of the monitor is plain, with subtle horizontal lines and a small slot or vent on one side, but no visible ports or buttons. The overall construction suggests a combination of plastic for the casing and stand, with internal components likely including glass and metal.
description: A modern flat-panel computer monitor with a matte black bezel, circular pedestal stand, and a red display featuring 'The Red Hat Archive' text.
description_view_0: Rear view showing a plain black back panel with subtle horizontal lines and a small slot or vent on the left side.
description_view_1: Side profile revealing the monitor's slim depth and the circular pedestal stand, with no visible buttons or ports.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the screen with 'The Red Hat Archive' text, framed by a matte black bezel and supported by a circular stand.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile, similar to view 1, showing the monitor's thin profile and the round base.
attribute_screen_bezel_design: The bezel is matte black, moderately thick, with slightly rounded corners and a smooth, untextured finish. It frames the display area evenly on all sides without decorative elements.
attribute_stand_type: The stand is a circular pedestal base, made of black plastic, providing stable support. It appears fixed with no visible adjustability features.
attribute_button_placement: No physical buttons or controls are visible on any side of the monitor.
attribute_brand_logo: A brand logo is present on the front display, centered and reading 'The Red Hat Archive' in white text against a red background.
